ORBMENT_BUTTON.title: Battle Orbment
ORBMENT_BUTTON.description:
Click to open the Battle Orbment menu, only while outside of Combat.

Here you can change which [gold]Quartz[/gold] are slotted, granting various effects.
ChooseAnOrbalArt:
Choose an Orbal Art.
Confirm with no selection to close.
ORBAL_ARTS_BUTTON.title: Orbal Arts
ORBAL_ARTS_BUTTON.description:
Click to view your Orbal Arts.

The number shows how many casts you have left this turn.

Choose a castable Art to add it to your hand.
